scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn --app-dir src study_podcast.infrastructure.app:create_app --factory --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.start: cd backend && uv run uvicorn --app-dir src study_podcast.infrastructure.app:create_app --factory --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.check:backend: cd backend && uv run pytest && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
